name: Wellness Program Premium Discounts and Rebates

eligibility.description: Available to group health plans that implement wellness programs adhering to specific health promotion and disease prevention criteria.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Employers can reduce their health plan costs and employee contributions by establishing programs of health promotion and disease prevention that offer premium discounts, rebates, or modified copayments/deductibles.
